zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Neville於大約1431年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親Richard Neville31歲，母親Alice Montagu27歲。他於1457年4月25日與Isabel Ingoldesthorpe在英國肯特坎特布瑞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年4月13日在英國賀特福爾巴內特享年41歲，埋葬在英國波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Neville于大约1431年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲Richard Neville31岁，母亲Alice Montagu27岁。他于1457年4月25日与Isabel Ingoldesthorpe在英国肯特坎特布瑞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年4月13日在英国賀特福爾巴內特享年41岁，埋葬在英国波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Neville was born about 1431, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Richard Neville, was 31 and his mother, Alice Montagu, was 27. He married Isabel Ingoldesthorpe on 25 April 1457, in Canterbury, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 13 April 1471, in Barnet, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Neville est né environ 1431, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Neville, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Montagu, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Ingoldesthorpe le 25 avril 1457, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1471, à Barnet, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Neville um 1431 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Neville 31 und seine Mutter Alice Montagu 27. Er hat am 25. April 1457 in Canterbury, Kent, England Isabel Ingoldesthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 13. April 1471 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Barnet, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Neville è nato il circa 1431 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Neville, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice Montagu, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Ingoldesthorpe il 25 aprile 1457, nel Canterbury, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1471, nel Barnet, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Bisham, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Nevilleが約1431年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Richard Nevilleは31歳，母Alice Montaguは27歳であった。1457年4月25日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーでIsabel Ingoldesthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年4月13日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバーネットで41歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Neville(이)가 대략 1431년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Neville(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Montagu(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1457년 4월 25일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 Isabel Ingoldesthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 4월 13일 영국 허트퍼드실르 바른에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

mn.Bisham, Berkshire, England: Bisham, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1431, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Neville, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Montagu, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Ingoldesthorpe em 25 de abril de 1457, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1471, em Barnet, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Neville родился около 1431 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Neville было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Montagu, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Ingoldesthorpe 25 апреля 1457 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 13 апреля 1471 г. в местности барнет, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия.

sm.from 1461 to 1471: mai le 1461 e o'o I le 1471

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Neville nació aproximadamente 1431, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Neville, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Montagu, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Isabel Ingoldesthorpe el 25 de abril de 1457, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1471, en Barnet, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
